title: glycosmis longipes
intro: Glycosmis longipes is a species of plant in the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the forest glycocarp. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in China, India, and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Glycosmis longipes include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections, and it can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and infusions.
